allow: Bash(mysql -u root aethrium-war -e "SELECT p.name, p.vocation, p.lookhead, p.lookbody, p.looklegs, p.lookfeet, p.looktype, g.name as guild_name, gm.rank_id FROM players p LEFT JOIN guild_membership gm ON gm.player_id = p.id LEFT JOIN guilds g ON g.id = gm.guild_id WHERE p.name = 'Bubble';")

Bash(sqlite3 aethrium.db "SELECT p.name, p.vocation, p.lookhead, p.lookbody, p.looklegs, p.lookfeet, p.looktype, g.name as guild_name, gm.rank_id FROM players p LEFT JOIN guild_membership gm ON gm.player_id = p.id LEFT JOIN guilds g ON g.id = gm.guild_id WHERE p.name = 'Bubble';")
